title: Automating Sustainability for the Venice Biennale
description:
Video Segment: 1:05-1:29.
Material is shown by the color and 3D pattern of the block.
Material amount is shown by height of the block.
Embodied carbon is shown by the erosion of the block.

visualChannels.comment: The height shows the amount of material.
There are different deformations looking like erosion, each material has its own pattern. The amount and way of deformation is showing the embodied carbon. The effect is animated.
Each material has its own basic pattern of deformation / erosion.

visualElements.comment: Intermediate proximity to data because the tower represents an object composed of different materials.
